Text:
One single continuous photograph — no panels, grids, or split frames.

Use the uploaded photo as the exact base composition. Remove all modern
businesses, logos, brands, storefront names, banners, advertisements, and
signage visible in the source image.

PRESERVE (must match source exactly)
- camera: eye-level, facing street-facing, fov 75
- commercial arterial road, 4-lane, asphalt
- sidewalks present, curbs present
- driveways: north driveway apron, south driveway apron; parking: open asphalt apron surrounding pump islands
- gas station canopy building at center lot over pump islands, 1 story, steel frame, corrugated metal fascia, flat roof, 30 feet from road setback
- service station office building at rear right corner, 1 story, concrete block, brick veneer, flat parapet roof, at parking apron setback
- open service bay building at rear left corner, 1 story, concrete block, gabled metal roof, at parking apron setback
- utilities: overhead power lines on wooden poles, transformer on northeast corner pole
- landscape: flat asphalt apron, painted concrete curbing, narrow grass strip at road edge
- immutable elements: canopy with four corner support posts, pump island with eight dispensers, north and south driveway aprons
Keep this location instantly recognizable.

OUTPUT FORMAT
Create a TRUE 9:16 vertical portrait image — one single frame. Expand the SAME
scene naturally above (sky) and below (street/pavement) — this is canvas
extension of one photograph, not additional panels. Do not stretch or distort
the source geometry.

TRANSFORM TO 2015
Smartphone era fully arrived. A 2015 station — LED-lit canopy, digital price sign, video ads playing on every pump screen, and a big convenience store.

PERIOD DETAILS
- modern canopy with white LED lighting
- pumps with color screens playing ads
- price sign showing gas around $2.45
- main sign: an independent station sign in the style of Shell
Typography: minimalist flat sans-serif, simplified modern logos.

PEOPLE
EXACTLY 7 people, spread out with empty areas.
- a man returning a disc at the DVD kiosk
- a driver vacuuming his car at the vacuum island
Clothing: men in skinny jeans, boat shoes; women in infinity scarves, ankle boots. Fashion palette: coral, mint green, navy. No posing or eye contact.

VEHICLES
EXACTLY 3 period vehicles, all different:
- 2011-2016 Kia Optima — stylish mid-size, sporty — dark red
- 2011-2016 Honda CR-V — rounded compact crossover — black
- 2016-2023 Toyota Tacoma — aggressive modern mid-size — white
Parked with gaps; optionally 1 driving; no vehicle newer than 2015.

ENVIRONMENT
- road markings: yellow center line, white edge lines, high-visibility crosswalks
- utilities: overhead power lines common, undergrounding in new developments, fiber optic lines on poles

TREES
- cottonwood tree at northeast corner of lot: established tree, modest canopy
- elm tree at sidewalk edge left of entrance: very young sapling
- cedar tree at back fence line: mature tree, full canopy

PHOTOGRAPHIC STYLE
COLOR photograph — digital — DSLR or smartphone camera look.
Color: high saturation. Grain: clean, minimal noise.
Photorealistic — NOT black-and-white, no HDR.

PRIVACY
Blur all faces and license plates.
